parts.text: I am looking for new phones but would like to know when we can upgrade.
I'm checking if any of our phones is eligible for HUP.
I’d like to know if my line is eligible for HUP.
Am I/is our company phones qualified for device upgrade on my business account?
Can you confirm my/our upgrade eligibility?
I want to check if my/our phones is/are eligible for  hardware upgrade.
